name: Rewardful SaaS Affiliate Program API
what_it_does: Rewardful SaaS affiliate program REST API for subscription businesses to create and manage Stripe-native affiliate programs with automatic commission calculation, coupon-based tracking, affiliate portal, and payout management. Enables AI agents to manage affiliate account creation and program configuration for SaaS affiliate automation, handle referral tracking via coupon code and link for attribution automation, access commission calculation and adjustment for compensation management automation, retrieve payout request and processing for affiliate payment automation, manage campaign and commission tier configuration for incentive structure automation, handle affiliate performance reporting for program analytics automation, access webhook event processing for real-time affiliate activity automation, retrieve Stripe subscription sync for recurring commission automation, manage custom affiliate portal branding for program identity automation, and integrate Rewardful with Stripe, Paddle, Chargebee, and SaaS billing platforms for end-to-end subscription affiliate program automation.
use_cases: Running SaaS affiliate programs from program automation agents
Tracking coupon-based referrals from attribution agents
Processing affiliate commissions from Stripe-native billing agents
Managing affiliate payouts from payment automation agents
not_for: E-commerce product affiliate programs (use ShareASale or Refersion for e-commerce)
Large publisher affiliate networks (use Impact.com or Rakuten for publisher networks)
Non-Stripe billing platforms (Rewardful is deeply Stripe-native)
best_when: A Stripe-billing SaaS company wanting AI agents to automate affiliate program management, coupon-based referral tracking, recurring commission calculation, and affiliate payouts through Rewardful's Stripe-native affiliate platform.
avoid_when: STRIPE DEPENDENCY — NON-STRIPE BILLING NOT SUPPORTED: Rewardful's core tracking relies on Stripe webhooks for conversion attribution; non-Stripe billing systems (Paddle, Chargebee) have limited or beta integration; automated affiliate program for non-Stripe billing must verify integration maturity; automated Stripe-native commission calculation fails for non-Stripe subscription events. COUPON CODE TRACKING vs LINK TRACKING ATTRIBUTION: Rewardful supports both coupon code tracking and referral link tracking; automated attribution must handle both tracking methods; automated coupon-only attribution creates false negatives for affiliates who share links without coupon codes; implement both attribution methods for comprehensive commission coverage. COMMISSION TIER CHANGE AFFECTS IN-FLIGHT REFERRALS: Rewardful commission tier changes apply to new referrals; active referrals in trial period may use original commission rate; automated commission tier reconfiguration during active campaigns must document which referrals use original vs new tier; automated commission reconciliation must account for tier transition period.

auth.notes: Rewardful uses API key (Basic Auth) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Remote company (founded in Canada). Founded 2018 by Parker Moore. Bootstrapped/profitable. Products: Stripe affiliate tracking, coupon-based referrals, recurring commissions, affiliate portal, payout management. Integrations: Stripe, Paddle (beta), Chargebee (beta). GDPR. Serves SaaS companies with Stripe billing. Competes with Tapfiliate, FirstPromoter, and PartnerStack for SaaS affiliate programs.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($49/mo, up to $5K commission/mo), Growth ($79/mo, up to $15K), Enterprise ($229/mo, unlimited); annual discount
pricing.notes: Remote. Bootstrapped/profitable. Monthly subscription based on commission volume. 14-day trial.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; affiliate and commission queries throttled; webhooks for affiliate, referral, and payout events

known_agent_gotchas: STRIPE WEBHOOK CONFIGURATION IS PREREQUISITE: Rewardful affiliate tracking depends on Stripe webhook events (customer.subscription.created, invoice.paid); automated affiliate program setup must configure Stripe webhooks pointing to Rewardful before first conversion; automated affiliate program without Stripe webhook integration tracks clicks but misses commission-triggering subscription events

AFFILIATE vs REFERRAL vs COMMISSION OBJECT DISTINCTION: Rewardful has separate API objects for Affiliates (program participants), Referrals (tracked prospects), and Commissions (earned rewards); automated program reporting must query correct object type; automated commission reporting using referral endpoint returns prospect count, not earned commission data

TRIAL PERIOD COMMISSION DELAY: Rewardful holds commissions during customer trial period (typically 30 days); automated commission dashboard must distinguish pending commissions (in trial) from confirmed commissions (converted); automated payout processing must filter to confirmed-only commissions to avoid paying on cancelled trials

PAYOUT REQUIRES MANUAL APPROVAL BY DEFAULT: Rewardful payout requests require manual approval; automated payout disbursement via API creates payout request but does not auto-approve; automated payout workflow must implement approval step; automated payout auto-approval may require Rewardful enterprise plan configuration

CAMPAIGN vs DEFAULT PROGRAM COMMISSION RATES: Rewardful supports multiple campaigns with different commission rates; automated affiliate invitation must specify target campaign; automated invitation to default program when target campaign rate differs creates incorrect commission expectation for recruited affiliate
agent_readiness.security_notes: SaaS affiliate. GDPR. API key. US. Affiliate, referral, and commission data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SaaS affiliate. GDPR. API key. US. Affiliate and commission data.
